## Constraints
- Follow existing architecture and naming conventions
- Prefer extending existing modules over introducing new abstractions
- Reuse existing error and response models where applicable
- Keep changes scoped to this work item

- [ ] Tests are added or updated

- [ ] PR includes implementation summary and verification notes
